summary: Best bet is a paid niche-specific template bundled with a benchmark product, because it leverages existing audience trust while remaining productized and low-service.
why: Benchmarks add context and reduce buyer uncertainty.
The bundle supports stronger pricing than a template alone.
The offer can be validated before full production.

core: Benchmark pack with examples, ranges, comparisons, or scorecards
tiers: Template plus benchmark pack plus periodic updates

presell_steps: Open early access for the bundle
Use feedback to refine version one
risks: Niche may be defined too broadly
bottom_line: A paid template plus benchmark product is the strongest audience-presell motion under the stated constraints.
